plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with your friends.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take profile photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for attendance tracking.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location in the background for attendance tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location while the app is active.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to let you take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app uses the photo library to let you choose profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs access to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to location to track your attendance while you are using it.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to location to track your attendance even when closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs access to location to track your attendance in the background.
